item.title: [Google Ads] Announcing v23.2 of the Google Ads API
item.description: Today, we’re announcing the v23.2 release of the Google Ads API. To use the new v23.2 features, you must upgrade your

item.title: [Google Ads] The Branded Search Playbook: Defend Your Brand Without Killing ROI [Inside Google Ads Episode 113]
item.description: Should you be paying for ads when people are already searching for your business by name? This "brand tax" is one of the most debated topics in the Google Ads community, but the decision should be based on data, not a gut feeling. In episode 113 of the Inside Google Ads podcast, #1 Most Influential

item.title: [Google Ads] Google Ads: Master Keyword Match Types & Bidding #shorts
item.description: Start with exact match keywords, then evolve to phrase and broad match. Leverage conversion data with maximized conversions or target CPA bidding for optimal ad performance. #KeywordStrategy #GoogleAds #Bidding #DigitalMarketing

item.title: [Google Ads] Stuck at $5k/mo? The Google Ads Scaling Blueprint
item.description:
Is your Google Ads spend stuck at $5k or $10k a month? Discover how to scale your budget predictably WITHOUT watching your profit margins nosedive.
👉 Ready to confidently scale your Google Ads past $5k/month without destroying your ROI? Work with Aaron & his highly experienced coaches to build a p

item.title: [General] In The Zone with Jyll Saskin Gales & Menachem Ani
[Google Ads] Google Ads: Boost Your Business with This Data Strategy #shorts
item.description: Unlock better Google Ads performance by giving Google more context about your business. Connect your products, set up retargeting audiences via Google Analytics 4, upload customer lists, and track website visitors. This data helps Google understand your business and improve ad targeting. #GoogleAds

item.title: [Meta Ads] How Do You Advertise Products with Long Buying Cycles?
item.description: Today's question is about advertising expensive products with long buying cycles that fall outside the seven or 28 day attribution window. Should you run traffic campaigns instead of purchase campaigns if most conversions won't be tracked anyway? Jon explains why you need to confirm this is actually

item.title: [Google Ads] 5 ways to collaborate with our agentic advisors
item.description: Top tips and best practices for collaborating with Ads Advisor and Analytics Advisor

item.title: [Google Ads] Ads Decoded episode 5 navigates the challenges and impact of effective lead gen advertising.
item.description: We’re breaking down the steps — from lead scoring to data hygiene — to enable your campaigns to deliver high quality lead volume.

item.title: [Meta Ads] Marketing API: Latest Updates for Ads on Threads
item.description: Following our recent global expansion, we’re excited to share the latest updates to the Threads Marketing API, enabling partners and advertisers to adopt new ad features and tools for enhanced campaign performance and moderation.

item.title: [General] 「スワイプLPって結局どうなの？」制作ツールの選び方やメリット、検証結果を解説
item.description: 「スワイプLP」という言葉は聞いたことがある。でも、何がどう良いのかはよく分からない。そんな方も多いのではないでしょうか。 LP（ランディングページ）の改善を考えるとき、「情報量を削ると理解が浅くなる…

item.title: [General] Programmatic Campaigns in 2026: Employing Tactics, Data, and Bid Strategies
item.description: Programmatic advertising is the automated buying and selling of digital ad inventory using software, data, and real-time auctions.  Over recent years, it has became the backbone of digital media. From display to CTV to digital audio, programmatic quietly coordinates who sees which ad, on whi

item.title: [General] Pinterest Promote a Pin: How the New Boost Feature Works, When to Use It, and What It Means for Marketers
item.description: Pinterest has introduced Promote a Pin, a simpler way to put paid support behind existing Pins. For marketers, creators, and small businesses, that matters because it lowers the barrier to entry for advertising on a platform where users often arrive with planning and purchase intent already in mo

item.title: [General] OpenAI Hires Dave Dugan to Lead ChatGPT Advertising: What Brands, Publishers, and SEO Teams Need to Know

For months, the market has watched OpenAI test ad concepts, outline principles for how ads

item.title: [General] Nike x Swarovski Air Jordan 1 High OG: Price, Release Date, Where to Buy, and What the Limited Drop Means
item.description: Nike and Swarovski did not approach this Air Jordan 1 release like a standard sneaker launch. They treated it like a tightly controlled product event. The result is the Swarovski x Air Jordan 1 High OG, a women’s release in Vast Grey priced at $1,005, built around one of the most recognizable sil

item.title: [General] How to Build an AI Agent-Ready Ecommerce Store: 12 Requirements for Google, ChatGPT, and AI Shopping Visibility
item.description: Ecommerce teams spent the last decade optimizing stores for human visitors. The priorities were familiar: cleaner UX, faster pages, better product photography, stronger category pages, better mobile checkout, tighter CRO. That work still matters. But a new buyer has entered the journey: the AI ag

item.title: [General] Snapchat Users Created Nearly 2 Trillion Snaps in 2025: What It Means for Engagement, Growth, and Marketing Strategy
item.description: When a platform says its users created nearly 2 trillion pieces of content in a single year, the number is large enough to blur into abstraction. It sounds impressive, but without context it is hard to know what, exactly, that figure tells us. Is it a vanity metric? A sign of genuine product-mark

item.title: [General] Reddit’s New Retail Marketing Tools: What Collection Ads, Deal Overlays, Dynamic Product Ads, and Shopify Integration Mean for Ecommerce Brands
item.description: Retail marketers have spent the last several years trying to solve the same problem in increasingly crowded digital environments: how to reach shoppers when they are still deciding, still comparing, and still open to influence. item.title: [General] Meta Adds New In-App Sales Tools for Businesses: What Affiliate Links, Reels Product Tags, One-Tap Checkout and Facebook Shops Expansion Mean
item.description: When a platform makes several commerce changes at once, it usually signals more than a product update. It signals direction. Meta’s latest round of shopping and monetization features does exactly that. Instead of treating Facebook and Instagram as places where product discovery happens and conver

item.title: [General] Do “You Are an Expert” Prompts Hurt AI Accuracy? What the Research Says About Persona Prompting
item.description: For a long time, one of the most common pieces of prompt advice on the internet has been simple: start by telling the model who it is. “You are an expert SEO strategist.” “You are a world-class financial analyst.” “You are a senior software engineer.” The assumption behind those prompts is easy t
